content.en:
From the beginning of its birth to the present, the Primordial Ancestral Realm has also been opened many times, so the Battle Gate has naturally collected some information, including the information of dozens of forbidden places.

One of the pieces of information made Ye Tian a little interested, and the forbidden land in that information was a little special, because the Holy Soul Beasts there had spatial abilities and their strength was also very terrifying, and there were even Invincible Domain Ancestor level Holy Soul Beasts among them.

According to the data, if you don't have the combat power of the five-step extreme invincible domain ancestor, it will be difficult to save your life inside, and once you enter, you will die in an instant.

"That forbidden place should be the territory of that Holy Soul Beast race, those Holy Soul Beasts may have spatial holy endowments!"

Ye Tian guessed.

This is an opportunity, if it is true, he can copy a large number of spatial holy endowments, so as to raise his spatial holy endowments to the level of ancestral endowments, and then he can easily upgrade the Void Slash Holy Technique and the Void Escape Holy Technique to the ancestral technique, and his strength will also increase significantly.

Wow!

Ye Tian hurried quickly, and after spending a little time, he finally arrived at the forbidden land.

This forbidden place was also named the Void Realm by the Ten Holy Gates of the Dark Sanctuary.

As soon as Ye Tian approached this forbidden land, he felt a terrifying aura, but this aura also said to him that the threat was not great, but for other Supreme Domain Ancestors, this was indeed an extremely terrifying forbidden land.

In such a dangerous forbidden land, other Supreme Domain Ancestors would naturally not come, so there was only Ye Tian here.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian stepped into the void realm and walked in.

As soon as he entered the Vain Death Void Realm, Ye Tian immediately sensed that one after another Holy Soul Beasts were rushing over.

Among them, many Holy Soul Beasts actually possessed the realm of Invincible Domain Ancestors.

It's not just one or two, it's many.

"No wonder this forbidden land is so dangerous, there are too many invincible domain ancestors!"

Ye Tian muttered.

These Holy Soul Beasts are almost all the same, like a large plate, which can differentiate countless tentacles.

These holy soul beasts rushed over, and countless tentacles controlled the power of space, forming countless dense space spears, and one tentacle controlled a space spear, piercing through.

Ye Tian didn't kill these Holy Soul Beasts at the first time, but used his copy talent to probe their talents.

As soon as the copy talents were probed, their talents were immediately perceived.

"Sure enough, there is a space endowment!"

Ye Tian said happily.

【Holy Endowment: Empty Spear】

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

Ye Tian frantically copied these Empty Spear Saints, and in the blink of an eye, he copied a large number of Empty Spear Saints, and then he made a move.

"Zu Jia!"

"Golden Silk Ancestral Technique!"

"Streamer Ancestral Technique!"

"Golden Body Ancestral Technique!"

"Hegemony Ancestral Technique!"

......

Ye Tian performed an ancestral technique, his combat power was extremely terrifying, and he could kill a group of Holy Soul Beasts with a single blow.

After a while, a group of corpses of holy soul beasts were left here, and a lot of holy soul power escaped from these corpses and merged into Ye Tian's soul, but Ye Tian's holy soul had already completed the second qualitative transformation, so this holy soul power was useless to him.

Ye Tian swept all the way, and there was even a Holy Soul Beast comparable to the Five-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor, but it also turned into a corpse under Ye Tian's crazy attack.

Fighting day after day, Ye Tian didn't know how long he had been killed.

There are a lot of Holy Soul Beasts here, and most of them are in the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm, so they are relatively difficult to kill, and it will naturally take a little longer.

After a long time, Ye Tian looked around, there was no trace of the Holy Soul Beast here, and he had also come to the center of the Vain Death Void Realm.

Here, he saw a gray hedron, the size of a star, suspended in the void.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian took a closer look, but he didn't recognize the usefulness of this gray spar.

However, Ye Tian felt the power of space from it, and a special space force seemed to be affecting Ye Tian's soul, as if it was going to transform its soul.

"Could it be that this gray spar can make people give birth to spatial saints?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If it's true, then this gray spar is too rebellious!

"Close!"

Ye Tian tried to collect this gray spar, but he didn't succeed, it seemed to be a part of the Holy Soul Realm, and it was difficult to deprive this gray spar.

So, Ye Tian collected it with all his strength, and even mobilized the strength of his whole body, and only then did he move the gray spar to his inner world little by little.

However, just after the gray hedron was collected, it turned out to be smaller, and the light became extremely dim, and the spatial aura became very faint.

Eventually, it became a man-sized hedron that was countless times weaker.

Ye Tian held the gray spar and obtained a set of information from it.

"It can create nine Empty Spear Saints!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Originally, it was afraid that it could create a lot of Empty Spear Saints, and the Spatial Saint Endowment Race here was an example.

However, this is due to the special nature of the Holy Soul Realm, which has such an effect, and if it is taken out, it will not have such a terrifying effect!

Therefore, after this spar was deprived, it lost the increase of the Holy Soul Realm, and could only be given to the nine people with the Empty Spear Holy Endowment.

But even so, it is very terrifying, and the ancestors know about it, and they are afraid that they are all interested.

This gray spar is undoubtedly Ye Tian's biggest harvest.

"Having copied so many spatial endowments, it's time to try to fuse them into ancestral endowments!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to fuse the large amount of spatial holy endowments.

Under the acceleration of time, Ye Tian fused a door spatial holy endowment, and after a long time, he successfully fused all the spatial holy endowments.

And the space endowment has also successfully transformed into a space ancestral endowment.

【Ancestral Fu: Space】

Seeing this word, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Subsequently, he began to copy the body, and then let the copied body evolve, deducing the Void Slash Sacred Technique and the Void Escape Holy Technique.

In this way, some more years have passed, and the Void Slash Saint Technique and the Void Escape Saint Technique have finally become the Void Slash Ancestral Technique and the Void Escape Ancestor Technique.

The Void Slash Saint Technique was so powerful, the Void Escape Ancestor Technique almost made Ye Tian invincible.

Therefore, with the addition of these two ancestral skills, Ye Tian's strength has increased significantly.

If these ancestral skills were cultivated to the Xiaocheng realm, Ye Tian's strength would probably be able to increase to the extreme of the four-step invincible domain ancestor combat power.

"I should go to other forbidden places!"

Ye Tian used the Empty Escape Ancestral Technique and disappeared.
